name: Bluegill
flavor: Small, scrappy, and always hungry. Every angler's first catch.

name: Perch
flavor: Stripes like a tiny tiger. Surprisingly good eating.

name: Largemouth Bass
flavor: It hits the line like it's got somewhere to be.

name: Rainbow Trout
flavor: Iridescent scales that shimmer even in dim light.

name: Channel Catfish
flavor: Whiskered and stubborn. It fights dirty, right along the bottom.

name: Pufferfish
flavor: Its spines are surprisingly soft when caught off-guard.

name: Golden Carp
flavor: Scales like hammered gold. Local legend says it brings luck.

name: Ancient Leviathan
flavor: Older than the dock itself. Most anglers only ever hear the splash.
